# SL-LINK-004: linked-nonindexable-page

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Internal navigation links to a route declared non-indexable.

## Metadata

- Category: Links and site graph (links-site-graph)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: site
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- crawler
- raw-html

## Required Evidence

- source-url
- target-url
- route-contract

## When This Triggers

Join crawl graph targets with route indexability contracts.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Review links to non-indexable pages or update route contract.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/links/linked-nonindexable

Fixed direction:

- Review links to non-indexable pages or update route contract.

The generated documentation does not invent HTML, DSL, source locations,
selectors, or external observations beyond the catalog fixture references above.

## Implementation Surfaces

- CLI, crawler, browser collector, overlay, and Next.js dev mode can share this
  rule through the common core engine.
- Crawler snapshots can provide crawl, robots.txt, sitemap, and site-graph
  evidence.
